rationale: Correct deontic logic framing with multiple equivalent formulations but shallow on trade-offs between formulations, no calibrated confidence markers, and no discussion of known limitations or second-order effects of each encoding choice.
rubric_evidence: F(Act(a, α) ∧ ¬Prior(Consent(a, α))), where Fφ ≡ O¬φ
Choose α to range over only consent-sensitive actions
